articles.title: Tesla’s supply chain struggles forced it to sell off 75% of its bitcoin
articles.description: “This should not be taken as some verdict on Bitcoin," CEO Elon Musk said. "It's just that we were concerned about overall liquidity for the company.”

articles.title: Bitcoin price dips under $23K after earnings report reveals Tesla sold 75% of its BTC
articles.description: BTC’s march up toward $24,000 took a brief pause after media headlines announced that Tesla had sold 75% of its Bitcoin position.

articles.title: Breaking: Tesla sold 75% of Bitcoin holdings in Q2
articles.description: Elon Musk's electric vehicle maker has offloaded most of its BTC reserves, according to financial statements released on Wednesday.

articles.title: Terraform Labs Investigation Intensifies: Seven Crypto Exchanges Linked To Collapse Raided
articles.description: The South Korean cryptocurrency ecosystem is still experiencing issues because of the Terraform Labs probe. According to reports, the nation’s authorities advanced the probe on Wednesday with their most recent actions. The investigation into the fraud claims against the Terraform Labs management is still ongoing. Terraform Probe Heats Up As part of their ongoing inquiries […]

articles.title: XRP Wins Again: Bullish Rally Sees It Climb to Sixth Spot by Market Cap
articles.description: On CoinMarketCap, XRP has risen to sixth place as of today, July 20, with a market value of $17.63 billion. Being able to exceed not just Binance USD but also Cardano and Solana is a noteworthy accomplishment for Ripple’s native currency. Ripple’s native token, XRP, provides a means of payment settlement between banks and digital assets exchanges. It decreases the number of extra steps needed...

articles.title: Polygon zkEVM Heads to Ethereum Layer 2
articles.description: Polygon's new Layer 2 network is set to launch its testnet later this summer ahead of a full mainnet launch in early 2023. Polygon has announced a new Ethereum-compatible Layer 2 network.Revealed on-stage during the fifth Ethereum Community Conference in Paris Wednesday, Polygon zkEVM is the blockchain companys first fully Ethereum-compatible Layer 2 network.Unlike the MATIC blockchain, which...
